title: Odysseus + Gemma-4 26B & FREE APIs: RIP Hermes & OpenClaw! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Odysseus is an AI workspace that enables self-hosting with local models, agent capabilities, model comparison, and integrated productivity features like notes, memory, and calendar. It supports integration with providers like OpenRouter and NVIDIA NIM.
